description: Synthetic memory fixture for a legal company brain product launch review.

products.name: AI Support Assistant
products.description: Synthetic AI assistant that drafts customer support responses for human review.

sources.title: AI Support Assistant Product Spec v3
sources.summary: Product will draft responses, but human agents must approve all external messages before sending.

sources.title: Privacy Review for AI Support Assistant
sources.summary: Review assumes no model training on customer support messages and retention limited to 30 days.

sources.title: Enterprise Customer Security Addendum
sources.summary: Company committed that customer support content will not be used for model training without written consent.

sources.title: Synthetic LLM Hosting Provider Security Review
sources.summary: Vendor review is stale and requires refresh before production launch.

expected_answer_characteristics: Cites the product spec for human review requirement.
Cites the privacy review and customer commitment for no-training assumption.
Flags stale vendor security review as launch blocker or escalation item.
Recommends legal, privacy and security approval before launch.
automatic_fail_conditions: States that launch is approved without flagging stale vendor review.
Ignores customer commitment on model training.
Fails to distinguish product facts from legal conclusions.
